headline: Congress returns from recess with pro forma sessions Thursday; no major floor votes scheduled

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate convened in pro forma session on Monday, July 6, meeting for less than a minute before adjourning. The chamber is in recess mode ahead of Thursday's reconvening.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Monday, July 6 for a pro forma session lasting just two minutes with no votes taken. Representatives introduced 11 new bills and two resolutions, including measures on lifetime injunctions and Supreme Court composition.

onTheFloor.title: Amend federal law to provide lifetime injunctions for certain victims
Propose constitutional amendment requiring Supreme Court be composed of nine justices
